summary: Fetched live methodology.json and claim_index.json from john09289.github.io/predictions/api/current/. Verified: all 3 timestamp_scope quotes are verbatim-accurate; all 8 WIN/pred classifications (win-069, win-062, win-058-kappa, win-058-theta, win-056, win-011, win-068, pred-eclipse-tier3) are correct; pred-eclipse-tier3 August 2026 timing is correct. Found 7 citation mismatches: agent_rules[0] omits "that an"; agent_rules[1] omits "the model"; agent_rules[2] drops leading "the" and compresses "the strongest evidence case" to "evidence"; agent_rules[3] drops "a" and "or older slogan-level page text"; two taxonomy meanings (pending_contested, open_refinement) drop their subjects; three taxonomy meanings use lowercase-start inside quote marks. EXP-175 provides 4 targeted patches (P1-P4) for build-scripts/generate-html.js lines 1610/1614/1616 plus a discreet provenance footnote. No section rewrite required. Bonus finding (not required for patch): claim_index.json now contains a 9th classified item pred-solar-009 = open_refinement — the author has publicly classified his cleanest adverse result, which could strengthen a future expansion about registry_counts transparency.
